name: Macadamia Nut Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375°F.
2 In a medium bowl, combine egg, mashed bananas, melted butter, pineapple fruit spread, and vanilla extract. Stir until well mixed.
3 Add flour, coconut flakes, baking powder, and salt; mix thoroughly.
4 Stir in the chopped macadamia nuts.
5 Drop tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
6 Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7 Cool on wire racks. Store in a tightly covered container.
